title: Unsafe Deserialization of Untrusted Data
description: Using unsafe deserialization libraries on untrusted data can lead to remote code execution, privilege escalation, or denial of service (OWASP A08:2021 / CWE-502).

finding.message: Unsafe deserialization at '{{token}}' in {{file}} at line {{line}}.

references: Use safe alternatives: yaml.safe_load() (Python), JSON + typed schemas, Protocol Buffers, MessagePack.
Never deserialize data from untrusted sources without verifying an HMAC or digital signature first.
If Java ObjectInputStream is required, use a deserialization filter (JEP 415 / ObjectInputFilter).
